goals: 1. Complete correct engine — fix all GAPs, all choices policy-driven
2. Full policy control — every rng decision routes through PolicyCallback
3. Decouple engine/game_loop/policy/search per docs/architecture-refactoring.md tasks A-E
4. Train model that plays reasonable 8-10 turn games with itself (no blunders)
current_task: PPO v3 running (iter ~50/200). AWR v4 training on BC-diverse data (v56 BC + us_bc + v2_iter150 + v2_diverse_awr). Elo tournament for v3 iter50 in progress.
current_strategy: Build better v4 warmstart using v56 BC data (best US WR=0.325) to address USSR/US asymmetry. v4 AWR (65k rows, 4 models including BC specialists) training now. v4 PPO to launch after v3 shows its plateau (~iter 100). All side-conditioned model scripting bugs fixed.
active_background: PPO v3 — training active, iter ~50/200, rollout_wr ~0.43-0.56 (variable)
AWR v4 training — data: v4_bc_diverse (v56+us_bc+v2_iter150+awr_warmstart), PID 654983, out: results/awr_sweep/v4_bc_diverse_gnn_side/
Elo tournament v3 iter50 — run_elo_tournament.py PID 653292
next_tasks: Check v3 iter50 Elo result when tournament completes
AWR v4 training completing: script and benchmark v4 warmstart → should beat v3 warmstart (0.314 combined)
V4 PPO: launch when v3 iter100 benchmarks available (or at iter ~120 if v3 plateaus)
Benchmark v4 AWR warmstart: target >0.350 combined (v56 BC data should improve US side)
CountryAllocHead AWR ablation: train on v4_bc_diverse data, compare vs gnn_side
Run parity harness tests (79 tests, last killed mid-run)

frame_migration_plan.apply_ops_randomly_impl_silent_divergenc: Cards 52/68 partially migrated — their CardSelect visible but nested ops uses apply_frame_ops_randomly_impl (random RNG) instead of surfacing frames. Slice E fixes.

ppo_chain.status: v2 COMPLETE iter 200/200. last20_avg rollout_wr=0.523 (ussr=0.698 us=0.348). v3 RUNNING from gnn_side AWR warmstart.
ppo_chain.best_baseline: gnn_card_attn_v1 post Tier-1+2 engine fixes (combined=0.448 @ N=200/side)
ppo_chain.restart_conditions: Only restart chain on explicit user request or after architecture/engine change requiring fresh run
ppo_chain.awr_fixed_engine_data: data/awr_eval/fixed_engine_v1/awr_fixed_engine.parquet — 73,981 rows, 4 models (all named ppo_best_scripted, dedup fix added to collector)
ppo_chain.v3_warmstart_source: results/awr_sweep/fixed_engine_full.json best checkpoint (to be selected by pipeline)

ismcts_verdict.diagnosis: Value head trained on partial-info states gives poor estimates on determinized states.
ismcts_verdict.fix_required: Train separate value head on determinized states, or use heuristic rollouts. High effort, deferred.

gap_tracker: ALL DONE (GAP-001 through GAP-043). GAP-044/45/46 WONTFIX (promo cards).
pragmatic_heads: ALL DONE (phases 1-4). Star Wars card 103 deck-choice low priority.
jsd_probe: DONE — jsd_probe.py + probe set + train_ppo.py integration

codex_mcp_discovery.pattern: Call mcp__codex__codex directly from main session — no subagent needed. General-purpose bg agents also inherit MCP. Custom agent types do NOT.

new_models_implemented.CountryAllocHead: python/tsrl/policies/model.py:TSCountryAllocHeadModel — per-country per-ops score head + bounded_knapsack_dp decoder
new_models_implemented.gnn_card_attn_gated: TSControlFeatGNNCardAttnGatedModel — combines GNN+card-attn+FiLM gate, val_adv_card_acc=0.5744 on v7 data

collect_awr_fix: Fixed collect_awr_data.py: dedup stems auto-adds parent dir prefix when multiple models share same filename (avoids all models named ppo_best_scripted)

ppo_v2_benchmarks.note: No v2 checkpoint beats v56 BC combined. USSR peaked at iter150 (0.585) but US hurt (0.270). v56 BC still best combined (0.442). v2_diverse AWR (0.314) slightly better than v3 warmstart but both well below BC.

torchscript_fix: Fixed TorchScript __constants__ for _SIDE_SCALAR_IDX in all side-conditioned models (commit bed9e17). CountryAttnEncoder dynamic getattr replaced with stacked region_masks buffer. All models in MODEL_REGISTRY now scriptable.

awr_datasets.v4_bc_diverse_v1: data/awr_eval/v4_bc_diverse_v1/awr_v4_bc_diverse.parquet — 65,519 rows, includes v56 BC and us_bc specialist
